---
id: get-spaces
title: "查询空间列表"
description: "查询父级空间下的子空间，可选包含父空间自身"
sidebar_label: "查询空间列表"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/aiot-api/aiot-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询空间列表"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/spaces"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



查询父级空间下的子空间，可选包含父空间自身

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"通过授权获取的访问 Token。"},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 App ID。"},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 Key ID。"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"随机字符串，每次请求都不同。"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"请求时间戳，单位毫秒。"},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"请求签名。如需了解签名生成方法，请参考 [Sign 生成规则](https://opendoc.aqara.cn/docs/%E4%BA%91%E5%BC%80%E5%8F%91/API%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%8C%87%E5%8D%97/Sign%E7%94%9F%E6%88%90%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99.html)。"},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"语言，默认英文。支持 'zh', 'en' 两种语言。"},{"name":"parentSpaceId","in":"query","description":"父空间 ID。为空时返回所有顶级空间（即没有父空间的空间，属于空间树的根节点）。","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"needChildren","in":"query","description":"是否查询子孙空间，默认true；当 parentSpaceId 是否查询父空间下的子空间。若 parentSpaceId 非空且 needChildren 为 false，则不返回子空间（仅在 needParentSpaceSelf 为 true 时可返回父空间自身）。","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean","default":true}},{"name":"needParentSpaceSelf","in":"query","description":"是否包含 parentSpaceId 对应的父空间自身。仅当 parentSpaceId 非空时生效。","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["spaceId","name"],"properties":{"spaceId":{"type":"string","description":"空间ID"},"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"父空间ID"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"空间名称"},"spatialMarking":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"空间标记"},"children":{"type":"array","nullable":true,"items":{"type":"object","properties":{"spaceId":{"type":"string","description":"子空间ID"},"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"父空间ID"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"子空间名称"},"spatialMarking":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"子空间标记"},"children":{"type":"array","nullable":true,"items":{"type":"object","properties":{"spaceId":{"type":"string"},"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","nullable":true},"name":{"type":"string"},"spatialMarking":{"type":"string","nullable":true}}},"description":"孙级及更深层子空间列表（结构同子空间节点，按此模式递归）"}}},"description":"子空间列表（树结构）"}},"title":"SpaceNode"}}}}],"example":{"type":"GetSpacesResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-000000000005","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"spaceId":"space-home-001","parentSpaceId":null,"name":"我的家","spatialMarking":"home","children":[{"spaceId":"space-floor1-001","parentSpaceId":"space-home-001","name":"一楼","spatialMarking":"floor","children":[]}]}]},"title":"SpacesResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"请求参数错误","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"参数
